2606.29180.title: Measuring Graph-to-Graph Semantic Similarity in Knowledge Graphs: An Empirical Evaluation of Knowledge Graph Embeddings
2606.29180.paper_summary: A Knowledge Graph (KG) represents facts as structured triples and is widely used to organize relational knowledge across diverse domains. Just as textual information ranges from words and sentences to complete documents, KG information can be interpreted at multiple levels, from entities, relations, and triples to subgraphs and entire KGs. However, existing KG embedding methods mainly focus on entities, relations, and triples, leaving graph-level semantics largely unaddressed. Conventional graph-level methods, which typically compare graphs based on structural patterns, are also insufficient because structural similarity alone cannot guarantee semantic similarity between KGs. To evaluate how well different methods capture such graph-level semantic information, we study graph-to-graph semantic similarity, which determines whether a pair of KGs represents semantically corresponding underlying information. To obtain reliable ground-truth correspondences, we construct a semantic matching dataset by modifying text documents, extracting KGs from both original and modified documents, and transferring their known correspondences to KG pairs. We compare text-based, structure-based, and KG embedding-based approaches on each dataset. For the KG embedding-based approach, we introduce two scoring functions: \textit{EmbPairSim}, which uses maximal pairwise entity similarity, and \textit{AvgEmbSim}, which uses a frequency-weighted centroid. Experiments on WikiText-2 and CC-News show that \textit{EmbPairSim} achieves up to 5.3 pp higher MRR than Sentence-BERT while using substantially fewer parameters. These results suggest that KGE representations can serve as compact and effective signals for graph-to-graph semantic similarity in KGs. Our code is available at https://github.com/SeungRyeolBaek/KG-to-KG-Semantic-Similarity.
2606.29180.paper_summary_zh: 知識圖譜（KG）將事實表示為結構化的三元組，並廣泛用於組織各個領域的關聯知識。就像文本信息從單詞和句子到完整文檔一樣，KG信息可以在多個層次上進行解釋，從實體、關係和三元組到子圖和整個KG。然而，現有的KG嵌入方法主要集中在實體、關係和三元組上，對圖層級語義的關注則相對不足。傳統的圖層級方法通常基於結構模式比較圖，這也不夠充分，因為僅僅依賴結構相似性無法保證KG之間的語義相似性。為了評估不同方法在捕捉這種圖層級語義信息方面的效果，我們研究了圖對圖的語義相似性，這決定了一對KG是否表示語義上對應的潛在信息。為了獲得可靠的真實對應關係，我們通過修改文本文檔來構建語義匹配數據集，從原始和修改過的文檔中提取KG，並將其已知的對應關係轉移到KG對中。我們在每個數據集上比較基於文本、基於結構和基於KG嵌入的方法。對於基於KG嵌入的方法，我們引入了兩個評分函數：\textit{EmbPairSim}，它使用最大對偶實體相似性，以及\textit{AvgEmbSim}，它使用頻率加權的質心。在WikiText-2和CC-News上的實驗顯示，\textit{EmbPairSim}的MRR比Sentence-BERT高出最多5.3個百分點，同時使用的參數顯著更少。這些結果表明，KGE表示可以作為KG中圖對圖語義相似性的緊湊且有效的信號。我們的代碼可在https://github.com/SeungRyeolBaek/KG-to-KG-Semantic-Similarity上獲得。
2606.29180.author: Seungryeol Baek et.al.
2606.29180.authors: Seungryeol Baek, Wooseok Sim, Hogun Park
